log: === INITIATIVE ===

Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 12] HIT! 22 damage. Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 135/157
→ Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)

⚡ Fire Genasi — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:5 total 15 vs AC 12 — still hits.
